query: UPDATE labSimulations SET status = 'error', errorMessage = 'Cleaned up: stuck in running state after Cloud Run restart' WHERE status IN ('running', 'scanning');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute UPDATE labSimulations SET status = 'error', errorMessage = 'Cleaned up: stuck in running state after Cloud Run restart' WHERE status IN ('running', 'scanning');
